package rulefixtures

import (
	"os"
)

// scenario for toctou_file_check_then_open: `os.Stat(path)` or file existence check followed by `os.Open(path)` or `os.Create(path)` without atomic operations
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario742Positive(path string) (*os.File, error) {
	if _, err := os.Stat(path); err != nil { return nil, err }
	return os.Open(path)
}
